calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Off Calendar

Michael Malki'S Notice Of Special Demurrer And Motion To Abate Proceedings
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bracamontes and Kristen Ross for Michael Malki. John Alkazin and Howard Berman for and with Martha Adriasola-Martinez.

Mr. Alkazin stated that the contest was based on the grounds of being registered domestic partners, that Mr. Malki had no standing as they were not of the same sex and they were not over the age of 62. In addition, Mr. Alkazin stated that Martha would be the sole heir had the decedent died intestate. Mr. Bracamontes stated the Quiet Title action had been filed prior to the petition for probate, that his client and the decedent had resided together for 9 years and that they were registered in the City and County of San Francisco as domestic partners. The Court granted the petition with limited authority, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was set at $10,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Handa.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Continued To May-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Alkazin and Howard Berman for Martha Adriasola Martinez. Michael Bracamontes fot Michael Malki.

The Court had originally continued the matter to June 10, 2008. At the request of all parties the matter was continued to May 28, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rafael Cabrera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Continued To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Michael Bracamontes and Kristen Ross for Michael Malki (Contestant). John Alkazin for Petitioner.

The Court stated that there were no written objections. Mr. Bracamontes informed the Court that the documents were filed yesterday. Mr. Alkizin stated that the objection was being made by someone who had no standing, that the only heir was the sister and that there were two matters filed in the civil court. The matter was continued to April 29, 2008.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: M. Loos.
